_comment_1: Copy this file to sync-adp.config.json and edit the paths to point at your sleeper_dynasty_adp snapshot dir.
_comment_2: On Windows escape backslashes (\\) or use forward slashes.
_comment_3: Leave 'season' unset (or null) to auto-detect: year if today's month >= April, else year - 1 (rolls over with the NFL Draft). Set explicitly only to override for testing past seasons.
